2017 performanceinstallationsite specificpublic art

11 Minutes Older

3-channel video recomposed for single screen viewing, full screen viewing recommended.

Documentation of the performance where the movie theater is transformed in the process of screening. Based on the film “10 Minutes Older” by Frank Herz (1977), used with the permission of the family. 3K digital scan from the original 35mm film produced with the assistance of the Jerusalem Cinematheque. Executed with with the assistance of Srdan Keca and Victor Yanez. Stanford, CA, USA, 2017
